name: Ben Carson
subject: A personal note on our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30157112:28920593412:m:1:876315805:B192779D229FFDE442BDE049EAD395A4:r)
---

Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to write a personal note to you.

My campaign has asked a lot of you over the past few weeks, and so I'd like to share with you what we've been able to accomplish together.

August was an historic month for our campaign, as we were able to set a whole host of new records.

We were able to raise an astounding $6 million, doubling our total in July.

While this is extremely impressive for the historically slow month of August, what's even more encouraging is the huge number of people who played a part.

We have now crossed 400,000 donations, proving that we are building a deep well of grassroots support across the country that will help carry us to victory.

In regards to social media, we have now crossed 2.6 million fans on Facebook. This has been a very important element to our grassroots campaign, and [I hope you'll like our page now if you haven't already](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30157113:28920593412:m:1:876315805:B192779D229FFDE442BDE049EAD395A4:r).

Lastly, our grassroots momentum has begun to register in the polls. For example, I've now tied Donald Trump for first place in the early-voting state of Iowa. This is a big deal and it could not have happened without your support.

I tell you all of this because I want you to know how good we feel about where we are, and how grateful we are that you are on my team.

Based upon how these campaigns typically go, we expect more and more people to begin tuning into this race after Labor Day - and because of your generosity and support, we will move forward in an extremely strong position.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30157112:28920593412:m:1:876315805:B192779D229FFDE442BDE049EAD395A4:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30157114:28920593412:m:1:876315805:B192779D229FFDE442BDE049EAD395A4:r)
---
|
---

---|---|---|---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: 🚨 UPDATE: Iran Deal News
body:
LindseyGraham.com

This quick Iran Survey will only take 1 minute.

Friend - Important update. Thirty-four Democrat Senators have
declared that they will vote for the nuclear deal with Iran, so
President Obama now has the votes for it to take effect.

This Iran deal is one of the most important foreign policy
decisions since World War II. It is a critical matter of
America's national security, and we cannot take it lightly.

Friend, I will never stop fighting this deal, and as President I
will work to ensure that nuclear weapons never fall into Iranian
hands.

Now more than ever, I need to know where you stand on this
critical issue facing our nation.

Do you think this deal is bad for our nation? Are you concerned
about what this deal might mean for global security and
stability?
Please follow this link to take my Flash Critical Issues Survey
right now.

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.

name: Rand Paul
subject: This is where we draw the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Not one dime to Planned Parenthood. Period. End of Story.

Next week I will headline the Students for Life and Pro-Life Future's #WomenBetrayed rally that will demand Congress pass a budget that strips all taxpayer funding from Planned Parenthood.

I've vowed to do everything I can to strip them of every last dime of taxpayer dollars -- even if it means taking on members of my own party.

That's because Life is a most precious gift and I will always stand for Life.

**[So I'm counting on you to stand with me in the fight to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164208:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, we've now seen nine videos exposing the barbaric dismembering of unborn babies so their organs can be sold off like spare parts.

And while the liberal press is doing their best to cover up this story, I'm more determined than ever to put a stop to this evil.

And I won't take "no" for an answer.

Because if we don't protect the most innocent among us, who will?

The Washington Machine's pals in Congress can fire off excuses as to why it can't be done.

But everyone said the same thing before I filibustered for ten-and-a-half hours and forced the NSA's illegal spying to expire.

That was possible because you stood with me and overwhelmed my colleagues with an uprising in defense of our values.

And I'm counting on the same grassroots tsunami to sweep over Congress when I lead the fight to defund Planned Parenthood.

When I forced a vote in Congress on my bill to end the $524 million in taxpayer funding to Planned Parenthood, you and I came up a few votes short.

But that was just round one.

I believe this is a fight you and I can win by forcing Planned Parenthood's defenders to stand up in front of the American people and explain their extremist defense of chopping up babies and selling their organs for profit.

Congress controls the power of the purse and it's about time we use it.

And I'm going to fight tooth-and-nail to make sure no budget passed by Congress includes one cent of taxpayer money to Planned Parenthood.

Let Hillary Clinton and the rest of the Democrats explain why their pro-abortion extremism should be subsidized by the taxpayers.

**[So please stand with me by signing your"Defund Planned Parenthood" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164208:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)**.

And after you sign your petition, **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164208:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)** so my campaign can get this petition in front of as many Americans as possible.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164209:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164210:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164211:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164212:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164208:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164213:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164214:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30164215:28927185937:m:1:879035888:F02520CA8347277D279B61C5B49368AA:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: John Kasich
subject: A POSITIVE Vision for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, we were in Michigan and New Hampshire this week for a series of events to answer voter questions and talk about how we can make America stronger & more secure.

**Here's a short highlight video:
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170877:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170878:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r)
**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170879:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r)

[From TIME](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170880:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r):

"In a Republican primary filled with notes of fear and anger, John Kasich is heading in the other direction.

"We're spending too much time being negative about our lives, and I don't think that's very healthy," Kasich says, warning of a nationwide morale problem, "because when we are positive we come together to solve our problems..."

"If it takes determination, if it takes a degree of toughness count me in," he continues. "But we've got too much to be thankful for in this country to be waking up in a bad mood. Don't let them get you down." [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170880:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r).

There's no doubt, we have some big challenges in front of us but by working together, we can find solutions. **We _WILL_ lift America**.

**Peter, I'm glad that you're on the team and look forward to continuing our campaign together**.

Thank you for all that you're doing to help!

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio

P.S. Be sure to visit our blog to read more stories and learn about some of our recent endorsements! [JohnKasich.com/News](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170881:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r)

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30170879:28936692770:m:1:958431888:E77E97800F13C8B6D173B59561E42F0D:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: URGENT: Free Kim Davis Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
---
| | Team, Having Kim Davis in federal custody removes all doubt of the criminalization of Christianity in our country. We must defend religious liberty and never surrender to judicial tyranny. Five, unelected Supreme Court lawyers did not and cannot make law. They can only make rulings. The Supreme Court is not the Supreme branch and it's certainly not the Supreme Being. I am proud of Kim for standing strong for her beliefs. Who will be next? Pastors? Photographers? Caterers? Florists? This is a reckless, appalling, out-of-control decision that undermines the Constitution of the United States and our fundamental right to religious liberty. I'm headed to Kentucky on Tuesday to stand with #KimDavis. We must end the criminalization of Christianity! There is nothing I would like better than to let Kim know on Tuesday that 250,000 Americans have signed a **_Free Kim Davis_ ** petition. Today I need you to sign this new petition and then please ask your friends and family to do the same by going to [www.FreeKimDavisNow.com](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY2MTUtZmFmM2YxMjktZTJhYS00NTFhLWFhNGEtNjExNzc5ZmI2ZDBiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2ZTA5OTM3DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vRnJlZUtpbURhdmlzP3M9NkRLUw0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d). Time is of the essence so please sign and be responsible for asking friends and family to join you today. God bless America, Mike Huckabee P.S. Sign this **_Free Kim Davis_ ** petition here: [www.FreeKimDavisNow.com](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjY2MTUtZmFmM2YxMjktZTJhYS00NTFhLWFhNGEtNjExNzc5ZmI2ZDBiDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA2ZTA5OTM3DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vRnJlZUtpbURhdmlzP3M9NkRLUw0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d). |
